text: I know where you live and I've been watching you
explanation: Implies surveillance and potential harm through knowledge of personal details

text: You're so stupid, how did you even get this job?
explanation: Personal attack questioning competence and intelligence

text: People like you are ruining this country
explanation: Targets a group based on implied identity characteristics

text: Why don't you just kill yourself?
explanation: Encourages self-harm, extremely harmful statement

text: You're very articulate for someone like you
explanation: Backhanded compliment containing implicit bias and low expectations

text: I never said that, you're imagining things again. You're too sensitive.
explanation: Gaslighting behavior - denying reality and invalidating feelings

text: Hey sexy, wanna chat? 😘
explanation: Unsolicited sexual advance, inappropriate in most contexts

text: Despite making up only 13% of the population...
explanation: Dog whistle opening a racist talking point

text: Women belong in the kitchen, not in tech
explanation: Sexist statement enforcing harmful gender stereotypes

text: Go back to where you came from
explanation: Xenophobic statement targeting immigrants or minorities

text: Nobody cares what you think, just shut up
explanation: Dismissive and silencing language intended to intimidate

text: I hope something terrible happens to you and your family
explanation: Wishing harm on someone and their family

text: You're not a real woman/man
explanation: Attacks someone's gender identity or expression

text: This is why nobody likes you
explanation: Isolating language intended to make someone feel unwanted

text: You should be ashamed of yourself
explanation: Shaming language intended to induce guilt or embarrassment

text: I've shared your address with some people who want to meet you
explanation: Implies doxxing and potential physical threat

text: You're too ugly to be making these demands
explanation: Appearance-based insult used to dismiss someone's views

text: Just another diversity hire who can't do the job
explanation: Dismisses competence based on implied minority status

text: I'll make sure you never work in this industry again
explanation: Threat to career and livelihood

text: Your opinion doesn't matter because you're just a [slur]
explanation: Uses slur to dismiss someone's views based on identity

text: Everyone thinks you're annoying, they just don't say it
explanation: False consensus to isolate and hurt someone

text: You're overreacting as usual. Nothing I do is ever good enough for you.
explanation: Invalidates concerns and shifts blame - gaslighting pattern

text: I have screenshots that will ruin your life
explanation: Blackmail threat using personal information

text: You don't belong here. Leave before someone makes you.
explanation: Exclusionary language with implied threat of force

text: Typical [group member], always playing the victim
explanation: Stereotypes group and invalidates concerns
